detail.description: Carlos Correa homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.
Carlos Correa doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham.

Carlos Correa singles on a line drive to left fielder Mickey Moniak.

Carlos Correa hits a ground-rule double (1) on a fly ball to right field. Jose Altuve to 3rd.
Carlos Correa singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Carlos Correa singles on a ground ball to catcher Logan O'Hoppe. Joey Loperfido scores. Yordan Alvarez scores. Isaac Paredes to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Logan O'Hoppe.
Carlos Correa singles on a line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Isaac Paredes scores.
Carlos Correa singles on a ground ball to shortstop Zach Neto.
Carlos Correa singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Jose Altuve to 2nd.
Carlos Correa doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder George Valera.

Carlos Correa singles on a line drive to right fielder George Valera.
Carlos Correa singles on a ground ball to left fielder George Valera. Brice Matthews to 3rd.
Carlos Correa singles on a line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan. Dustin Harris scores. Brice Matthews scores.
Carlos Correa singles on a line drive to left fielder George Valera.
Carlos Correa singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Dustin Harris to 2nd.
Carlos Correa singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Cam Smith scores.
Carlos Correa doubles (8) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Carlos Correa singles on a fly ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Carlos Correa homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.

Carlos Correa doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Luke Raley.
